import { directive } from '../directives' import { initTree } from '../lifecycle' import { mutateDom } from '../mutation' directive('html', (el, { expression }, { effect, evaluateLater }) => { let evaluate = evaluateLater(expression) effect(() => { evaluate(value => { mutateDom(() => { el.innerHTML = value el._x_ignoreSelf = true initTree(el) delete el._x_ignoreSelf }) }) }) })
